CustomField.formula: OR( ISPICKVAL( OIC_Status__c , 'ISSUED'), ISPICKVAL( OIC_Status__c , 'REVIEW'), ISPICKVAL( OIC_Status__c , 'HEARING'), ISPICKVAL( OIC_Status__c , 'PENDING'), ISPICKVAL( OIC_Status__c , 'INCOMPLETE'), ISPICKVAL( OIC_Status__c , 'RESUBMIT'), ISPICKVAL( OIC_Status__c , 'OPEN') )
CustomField.label: Document upload Accepted
